title: Dynamic JSON-Driven Request Templating
content: Store API request shapes as JSON templates with placeholders (e.g., {{max_tokens}}, {{thinking_config}}). When a model is selected, the plugin loads the corresponding template. This allows for 'live' updates to model support without re-compiling the plugin, essentially making the API access layer 'data-driven' rather than 'code-driven'.

checks_json.type_check: REFINE: Typing dynamic templates is complex and may lead to 'any' usage.
checks_json.constraint_check: PASS: Technically possible but might be over-engineered for a plugin.
checks_json.logic_check: PASS: Highest flexibility, but highest implementation cost.
